title: [codereview] concurrency cancel-in-progress always true
description: The concurrency group now correctly includes matrix.app (and sanitized board). However, cancel-in-progress: true will cancel in-progress runs even on main branch pushes. Standard practice is to set cancel-in-progress only for PRs: cancel-in-progress: ${{ github.ref != 'refs/heads/main' }}. This was found in codereview pass 2/3 after the matrix fix chunks. Discovered-from:project-LICHEN-qiad
close_reason: Fixed with replace('/') filter in cache/concurrency keys and conditional cancel-in-progress for main branch. 3 codereview passes done (cache char, concurrency logic, job name consistency). No further P0-P2. Main qiad not closed per instructions.
